parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json; const issues = data.issues || []; let tableRows = ''; for (const item of issues) { const problems = item.problems.map(p => `
  • ${p}
    • `).join(''); tableRows += ` ${item.title} ${item.wordCount} ${item.h2Count} ${item.localRefCount} ${item.hasCTA ? 'Yes' : 'No'}
      ${problems}
    `; } const html = `

    Content Quality Report - ${data.issueCount} Draft(s) Need Attention

    Checked ${data.checkedCount} recent AI-generated drafts. ${data.passedCount} passed, ${data.issueCount} flagged.

    ${tableRows}
    Title Words H2s Local Refs CTA Issues

    Review these drafts in blog_posts before publishing. Auto-generated by TG-104.

    `; return [{ json: { to_email: 'totalguardllc@gmail.com', subject: 'TG Content Quality Alert: ' + data.issueCount + ' draft(s) need review', html_body: html, workflow_name: 'TG-104', email_type: 'notification' } }];
